channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Browns owner Jimmy Haslam admits team 'took a big swing and miss' in trading for Deshaun Watson
item.description: Cleveland co-owner Jimmy Haslam admitted on Monday that the Browns “took a big swing and miss” with their 2022 trade for quarterback Deshaun Watson.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Controversial transgender swimmer Lia Thomas vows to fight trans athlete bans amid national shift on issue
item.description: Former UPenn transgender swimmer Lia Thomas recently spoke up in support of trans athletes amid bans on their inclusion in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stanford hires Frank Reich as interim football coach
item.description: STANFORD, Calif. (AP) — Andrew Luck picked a familiar face to take over as Stanford's interim football coach, hiring former NFL coach Frank Reich on Monday to replace the fired Troy Taylor.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dan Mullen, awed by UNLV facilities, says timing felt right to make return to coaching
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Dan Mullen could've returned to coaching sooner, but the timing never seemed right and, regardless, he was fine remaining at ESPN giving his insights about the latest in college football.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lauren Betts and UCLA reach first Final Four of women's NCAA Tournament, beating LSU 72-65
item.description: SPOKANE, Wash. (AP) — Lauren Betts had 17 points and seven rebounds despite spending the entire second quarter on the bench, and top overall seed UCLA reached its first Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament with a 72-65 victory over LSU on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Last perfect women's NCAA Tournament bracket busted with UCLA's win over LSU
item.description: The last perfect women’s NCAA Tournament has been busted. Top-seeded UCLA's 72-65 win over LSU on Sunday ended the final perfect bracket out of 3.2 million on ESPN's bracket tracker. The final flawless brackets on the CBS Sports platform ended with TCU's 71-62 win over Notre Dame on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kern County residents notch top times in 2025 Bakersfield Marathon
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- No amount of rain dampened the spirit of participants of the 2025 Bakersfield Marathon. The eighth edition of the race was delayed Sunday because of rain but when the starting gun went off, the big race was on.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge homers again, Chisholm Jr. goes deep twice as Yanks rout Brewers 12-3 to complete 3-game sweep
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge homered in his first at-bat, Jazz Chisholm Jr. homered twice and the New York Yankees went deep four more times in a 12-3 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers on Sunday, a day after becoming the third team in major league history to hit nine homers in a game.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Torpedo-shaped bats draw attention after Yankees hit team-record 9 homers in rout of Brewers
item.description: New torpedo bats drew attention when the New York Yankees hit a team-record nine homers that traveled a combined 3,695 feet.
item.dc:creator: Larry Fleisher, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Kelly Clarkson takes subtle shot at Cowboys owner Jerry Jones
item.description: Pop star Kelly Clarkson threw some subtle shade at Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones on Kylie Kelce's podcast earlier in the week. But she still is optimistic.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke's great D sends Blue Devils to their 18th Final Four with an 85-65 win over Alabama
item.description: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg swooped across the paint and swatted an Alabama player’s shot completely off the court. The ball landed in the stands. Flagg and the Blue Devils -- they’re headed to the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USC shakes off JuJu Watkins' absence and beats Kansas State 67-61 in March Madness
item.description: Kennedy Smith stepped into the void left by injured star JuJu Watkins, scoring 19 points to help Southern California hold off Kansas State 67-61 in the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA Tournament on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kyle Tucker homers as the Cubs hold off the Diamondbacks for a 4-3 win
item.description: Kyle Tucker hit his first home run with the Chicago Cubs, leading his new team to a 4-3 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Luge officials predict 2026 Olympic sliding races will be in Italy, a good sign for Milan-Cortina
item.description: Next year's Olympic sliding races will be in Italy after all, international luge officials predicted Saturday in another ringing endorsement of the newly rebuilt track in Cortina d'Ampezzo.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fans chant 'sell the team' at Rays home opener; team owner says talks are nothing new
item.description: The Rays pulled out a win in their new home for the season at Steinbrenner Field, but the ball club's future in Tampa Bay remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 9th-inning homer lifts Rays over Rockies 3-2 in Steinbrenner Field opener
item.description: Rookie Kameron Misner led off the ninth inning with his first major league home run, giving Tampa Bay a 3-2 win over the Colorado Rockies on Friday as the Rays began their season of home games at Steinbrenner Field.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bulls face the Mavericks on 4-game win streak
item.description: Dallas Mavericks (36-38, 10th in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (33-40, ninth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: Chicago aims to keep its four-game win streak intact when the Bulls take on Dallas. The Bulls are 14-22 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CF Montreal seeks first win of the season, visits the Chicago Fire
item.description: CF Montreal (0-4-1) vs. Chicago Fire (3-1-1) Chicago; Saturday, 8:30 p.m. EDT BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Chicago -175, Montreal +429, Draw +308; over/under is 2.5 goals BOTTOM LINE: CF Montreal seeks its first victory of the season when it visits the Chicago Fire.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: MTS boosts Trolley service for Padres Opening Weekend
item.description: The Friar Faithful will be taking over downtown San Diego on Thursday and into the weekend as the Padres take on the Atlanta Braves, marking the first home games of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego State Aztec guard declares for NBA Draft
item.description: San Diego State Aztecs men's basketball player Miles Byrd is looking to make his next move to the professional level.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Jerrod Calhoun signs new contract with USU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in three years, Utah State will not have to search for a new head basketball coach.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The MLB teams with the highest
item.description: A California team has the highest median ticket price, a new report found, but they don't play in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
